pageContext.name: Mipha (Collector's Edition)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and First 4 Figures present the latest offering from The Legend of Zelda™: Breath of the Wild PVC collection - the Mipha Statue!    This highly detailed Mipha PVC statue is inspired by her official artwork from The Legend of Zelda™: Breath of the Wild. Mipha stands in a gentle pose with her hand gently pressed upon her chest; her other hand wielding the Lightscale Trident.    The design on the base is based on the Sheikah tribe's eye symbol that appears when activating the Sheikah Slate interface.    The Collector's Edition of this statue comes with bright LED functions for the base!
